content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully completed the bug fix task. Here's a summary of what I did:

## Bug Analysis
The issue was in the `stripLeadingHyphens` method in `Util.java`. The method was calling `.startsWith()` on a potentially `null` string without checking for `null` first, which caused a `NullPointerException` when the test passed `null` as input.

## Solution
I added a null check at the beginning of the method to return `null` when the input string is `null`, which is the expected behavior according to the test case.

## Verification
- The triggering test `org.apache.commons.cli.UtilTest::testStripLeadingHyphens` now passes
- All other tests in the suite continue to pass, ensuring no regression was introduced

## Patch
The fix adds 4 lines of code to check for null input before processing the string:

```diff
diff --git a/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java b/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
index 2d88c30..6d0fc3f 100644
--- a/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
+++ b/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
@@ -33,6 +33,10 @@ class Util {
      */
     static String stripLeadingHyphens(String str)
     {
+        if (str == null)
+        {
+            return null;
+        }
         if (str.startsWith("--"))
         {
             return str.substring(2, str.length());
```

The patch is saved in `blind_fix.patch` as requested.

Perfect! I have successfully completed the bug fix task. Here's a summary of what I did:

## Bug Analysis
The issue was in the `stripLeadingHyphens` method in `Util.java`. The method was calling `.startsWith()` on a potentially `null` string without checking for `null` first, which caused a `NullPointerException` when the test passed `null` as input.

## Solution
I added a null check at the beginning of the method to return `null` when the input string is `null`, which is the expected behavior according to the test case.

## Verification
- The triggering test `org.apache.commons.cli.UtilTest::testStripLeadingHyphens` now passes
- All other tests in the suite continue to pass, ensuring no regression was introduced

## Patch
The fix adds 4 lines of code to check for null input before processing the string:

```diff
diff --git a/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java b/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
index 2d88c30..6d0fc3f 100644
--- a/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
+++ b/src/java/org/apache/commons/cli/Util.java
@@ -33,6 +33,10 @@ class Util {
      */
     static String stripLeadingHyphens(String str)
     {
+        if (str == null)
+        {
+            return null;
+        }
         if (str.startsWith("--"))
         {
             return str.substring(2, str.length());
```

The patch is saved in `blind_fix.patch` as requested.
